messages.content:
Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

Insufficient bound checks in the SMU may allow an attacker to update the SRAM from/to address space to an invalid value potentially resulting in a denial of service.

A vulnerability exists due to inadequate boundary checks in the System Management Unit (SMU), which may permit an attacker to improperly alter the Static Random-Access Memory (SRAM) address space. This could potentially lead to a Denial of Service (DoS) condition.
